name: GitHub
description: Search repositories, explore trending projects, and browse issues on GitHub

user_stories.i_want: to search for repositories on a topic
user_stories.so_that: I can find open-source tools and libraries for my projects

user_stories.i_want: to see what's trending on GitHub today
user_stories.so_that: I stay current on popular new projects in my field

user_stories.i_want: to browse open issues on a repository
user_stories.so_that: I can find bugs to fix or features to implement
